name: Public Library Usage and Socioeconomic Conditions: A County-Level Analysis
description: Merged dataset integrating IMLS Public Library Survey (PLS) FY2023 agency-level microdata with U.S. Census Bureau American Community Survey (ACS) 5-Year Estimates 2023 (Table DP03) at the county level. Includes cleaned, merged, and feature-engineered outputs linking library usage metrics (visits, circulation, programs, staffing, expenditures) with county-level socioeconomic indicators (poverty rate, median household income, unemployment, SNAP participation). Produced as part of IS477 at the University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign.

variableMeasured.name: poverty_rate_all_pct
variableMeasured.description: Percentage of all people below the federal poverty line (ACS DP03)

variableMeasured.name: median_hh_income
variableMeasured.description: Median household income in USD (ACS DP03)

variableMeasured.name: unemployment_rate_pct
variableMeasured.description: Civilian labor force unemployment rate (ACS DP03)

variableMeasured.name: snap_pct
variableMeasured.description: Percentage of households receiving SNAP benefits (ACS DP03)

variableMeasured.name: no_health_insurance_pct
variableMeasured.description: Percentage of population without health insurance (ACS DP03)

variableMeasured.name: work_from_home_pct
variableMeasured.description: Percentage of workers who work from home (ACS DP03)

isBasedOn.name: Public Library Survey FY2023 Agency-Level Microdata

publisher.name: Institute of Museum and Library Services (IMLS)

isBasedOn.name: American Community Survey 5-Year Estimates 2023, Table DP03
